content: هَتِلاَقي اِلسِنتراَل وَراَ اِلفَرَّع اَلرَّئيسي بِتاَع شِركِة اِلكَهرَبا
translations: eng:you will find the telephone centre behind the main branch of the electricity company

transcriptions.arabizi: hatilae'iilsintraal warailfarraA ilr'eesi bitaeA shirkit ilkahraba
